sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97599" key="sugkalupto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγ-κᾰλυπτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n97599.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wrapped up</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κνίσῃ κῶλα ς</foreign>. ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg003.perseus-grc1:496" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">496</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
